title: Why is Asuka so nice to Hikari
display_title: Why is Asuka so nice to Hikari
wikitext:
[]: Why is Asuka so nice to Hikari? Post by PurpleandRed » Tue Aug 18, 2015 12:39 pm I don't hate Hikari but I don't like using her name so I use whatsherface instead sometimes. Miss Goody-two-shoes is always so nice to her in the anime and hardly ever points out faults from her. but a little mean in the manga and I recall her showing her boobs to Kaji, which was disagreeable. If she were real, I would worry if she even likes me. Because she's so mean to everybody and the mean girl likes to act like a goody two-shoes to Hikari, which is unbalanced to me. Excuse me, but there's a lot of questions in this series. But people hardly talked about why Asuka may like Hikari and instead, thinking that she's too unfriendly to make friends with. I would make friends with her for her relationship to Hikari. But I would knock her out for being a jerk to me but not whatsherface!!! Did Asuka even do any other kindness in the Rebuild movies besides making a cookout for whatshername after she shared lunch with her (and there is a hint of freaking friendship with them in there, too, after I was told that she didn't make friends with her )

[]: Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 1:50 pm PurpleandRed wrote: I don't hate Hikari but I don't like using her name so I use whatsherface instead sometimes. Miss Goody-two-shoes is always so nice to her in the anime and hardly ever points out faults from her. but a little mean in the manga and I recall her showing her boobs to Kaji, which was disagreeable. If she were real, I would worry if she even likes me. Because she's so mean to everybody and the mean girl likes to act like a goody two-shoes to Hikari, which is unbalanced to me.

[]: Post by PurpleandRed » Tue Aug 18, 2015 2:23 pm Ash1969 wrote: Understatement of the year. I think she was friends with Hikari simply because whatsherface (I might call Hikari that from now on) was Class Rep. In addition, Asuka seemed to be friends with other girls at school but we, the three stooges, and Rei never met them.

[]: Post by pwhodges » Tue Aug 18, 2015 2:31 pm PurpleandRed wrote: I recall her showing her boobs to Kaji, which was disagreeable

[]: Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 2:32 pm PurpleandRed wrote: Why is it an understatement? That was wrong! Asuka never made friends, nobody wanted to make friends with her and thus, she doesn't know them well enough to be fighting with them. And the three stooges is not a phrase.

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Tue Aug 18, 2015 2:35 pm No friends? then whats this? http://wiki.evageeks.org/images/4/49/M26_C421_Group_Photo.jpg

[]: Post by pwhodges » Tue Aug 18, 2015 2:39 pm The three stooges has its origin in a phrase used by Asuka in episode 18 if I recall correctly. Platinum edition, ep 18 wrote: Shinji: What happened? You left before me, but you're awfully late. TOJI: What, no marital spat today? Asuka: I just didn't want to see your ugly faces! You three damn stooges!

[]: Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 2:40 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: No friends? then whats this? http://wiki.evageeks.org/images/4/49/M26_C421_Group_Photo.jpg

[]: Post by PurpleandRed » Tue Aug 18, 2015 2:59 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: No friends? then whats this? http://wiki.evageeks.org/images/4/49/M26_C421_Group_Photo.jpg

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:01 pm And why would Asuka be apart of it?

[]: Post by Iuvenal » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:01 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: No friends? then whats this? http://wiki.evageeks.org/images/4/49/M26_C421_Group_Photo.jpg

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:06 pm pwhodges wrote: The three stooges has its origin in a phrase used by Asuka in episode 18 if I recall correctly

[]: Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:10 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: And why would Asuka be apart of it?

[]: Post by PurpleandRed » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:12 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: And why would Asuka be apart of it?

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:13 pm She could've chosen not to be apart of it. that and the fact that she looks rather pleased to be with everyone

[]: Post by PurpleandRed » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:17 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: She could've chosen not to be apart of it. that and the fact that she looks rather pleased to be with everyone

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:18 pm How can one be sociable and not have friends?

[]: Post by Ash1969 » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:19 pm Arcadia's legacy wrote: She could've chosen not to be apart of it. that and the fact that she looks rather pleased to be with everyone

[]: Post by Iuvenal » Tue Aug 18, 2015 3:28 pm Ash1969 wrote: Aoba is arguably more anti-social/misanthropic than Asuka (though certainly more friendly and professional). Yet there he is perving it up with Maya and Ritsuko (I thought he was asexual?).

[]: Re: Why is Asuka such a goody two shoes to whatsherface? Miss Goody-two-shoes is always so nice to her in the anime and hardly ever points out faults from her. but a little mean in the manga and I recall her showing her boobs to Kaji, which was disagreeable. If she were real, I would worry if she even likes me. Because she's so mean to everybody and the mean girl likes to act like a goody two-shoes to Hikari, which is unbalanced to me.
